test_cases.name: health_check_returns_200
test_cases.description: Verifies the health endpoint returns a successful response.

test_cases.name: create_author_successfully
test_cases.description: Verifies a new author can be created with valid data.

test_cases.name: create_author_missing_required_field
test_cases.description: Verifies creating an author without the required name field returns a validation error.

test_cases.name: get_existing_author
test_cases.description: Verifies retrieving an existing author returns its details.

test_cases.name: get_nonexistent_author
test_cases.description: Verifies retrieving a non-existent author returns a 404 error.

test_cases.name: delete_author_without_books
test_cases.description: Verifies an author with no associated books can be deleted.

test_cases.name: delete_author_with_associated_books
test_cases.description: Verifies deleting an author who has associated books returns a conflict error.

test_cases.name: create_book_successfully
test_cases.description: Verifies a new book can be created with valid data and existing author/category.

test_cases.name: create_book_with_duplicate_isbn
test_cases.description: Verifies creating a book with a duplicate ISBN returns a conflict error.

test_cases.name: get_existing_book
test_cases.description: Verifies retrieving an existing, non-deleted book returns its details.

test_cases.name: get_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Verifies retrieving a soft-deleted book returns a 410 Gone error.

test_cases.name: soft_delete_book
test_cases.description: Verifies a book can be soft-deleted successfully.

test_cases.name: restore_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Verifies a soft-deleted book can be restored.

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_old_book
test_cases.description: Verifies a discount can be calculated for a book published more than a year ago.

test_cases.name: apply_discount_exceeds_rate_limit
test_cases.description: Verifies exceeding the rate limit for the discount endpoint returns a 429 error.

test_cases.name: increase_book_stock
test_cases.description: Verifies increasing a book's stock via a positive delta works.

test_cases.name: decrease_stock_below_zero
test_cases.description: Verifies decreasing stock below zero returns an insufficient stock error.

test_cases.name: add_review_to_book
test_cases.description: Verifies a review can be added to an existing, non-deleted book.

test_cases.name: create_tag_successfully
test_cases.description: Verifies a new tag can be created with a unique name.

test_cases.name: add_tags_to_book
test_cases.description: Verifies multiple tags can be added to a book.

test_cases.name: create_order_with_sufficient_stock
test_cases.description: Verifies an order can be created when books have sufficient stock.

test_cases.name: create_order_with_insufficient_stock
test_cases.description: Verifies creating an order for a book with insufficient stock returns an error.

test_cases.name: update_order_status_to_confirmed
test_cases.description: Verifies a pending order's status can be updated to confirmed.

test_cases.name: update_order_status_invalid_transition
test_cases.description: Verifies an invalid state transition (e.g., pending to delivered) returns an error.

test_cases.name: get_invoice_for_confirmed_order
test_cases.description: Verifies an invoice can be retrieved for an order in a confirmed/shipped/delivered state.

test_cases.name: get_invoice_for_pending_order
test_cases.description: Verifies retrieving an invoice for a pending order returns a 403 Forbidden error.

test_cases.name: bulk_create_books_with_api_key
test_cases.description: Verifies bulk creation of books succeeds when all items are valid and API key is provided.

test_cases.name: bulk_create_books_without_api_key
test_cases.description: Verifies bulk creation fails with a 401 error when the required API key header is missing.

test_cases.name: clone_book_with_new_isbn
test_cases.description: Verifies a book can be successfully cloned with a new ISBN.

test_cases.name: start_async_export_with_api_key
test_cases.description: Verifies an async book export job can be started when a valid API key is provided.
